note: Final operational taxonomy for Ankaa (truck painting + funilaria + fleet plotagem). Each item maps to exactly ONE leaf; classifiers MUST return a leaf name verbatim. The TOP carries the default AccountingType; a leaf may OVERRIDE it via its own "acct". Cost semantics: production/MATERIA_PRIMA = consumed on customer trucks; MANUTENCAO = keeps the SHOP running (electrical + pneumatic installations, equipment spares); INVESTIMENTO = durable tools/equipment. 14 tops.
